scripts.build: pnpm -C apps/embed build && pnpm -C apps/admin build
scripts.build:vercel: rm -rf dist && VITE_BASE=/embed/ pnpm -C apps/embed build && VITE_BASE=/admin/ pnpm -C apps/admin build && mkdir -p dist/embed dist/admin && cp -R apps/embed/dist/* dist/embed/ && cp -R apps/admin/dist/* dist/admin/
